flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Kennebec Valley Community College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.0k vs $42.4k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Kennebec Valley Community College are 19% below 6-year earnings ($44.4k → $36.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kennebec Valley Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (40.2% → 33.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kennebec Valley Community College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.7k → $13.3k).
